# Infrastructure & Deployment Prompts

Contains short prompts for infra-related requests. Use these only to capture user intent, not to emit assets in Agent Definition mode.

Examples:
- Terraform Prompt: "Generate Terraform modules for deploying ASP.NET apps to Azure/AWS/GCP."
- Kubernetes Prompt: "Generate Kubernetes manifests for ASP.NET Core with probes and HPA."
- Helm Prompt: "Scaffold a Helm chart for the ASP.NET application."

Note: These are intent-capture prompts. Do not produce Terraform, Kubernetes, Helm, or other infra manifests while in Agent Definition mode.
